name: Square defensive tower
description: Compact square defensive tower with @primary walls on a @secondary floor course, crenellated battlement (alternating merlons + gaps) on the rim, four window slits centered on each face at mid-height, a 1x2 door opening on the +z side, and a small interior outfitted with a lantern overhead and a chest in a back corner. Defensive on 4x6x4 to 12x14x12 AABBs.

required_furniture.rule: FillHollow shell of @primary; full perimeter on every floor level.
Alternating @primary merlons + air gaps every other cell on the perimeter ring one block above the tower top.
One slit of @glass at mid-height on each of the four faces, 1-2 blocks tall depending on tower height.
Two air cells at y0 and y0+1 centered on the +z face — the accessible side.
minecraft:lantern hanging just below the ceiling, near the center.
minecraft:chest on the floor inside a back-interior corner, opposite the door.

placement_rules: Battlement at top — merlons sit on the rim above the parapet walk in a 1-block alternating pattern.
Window slits centered each side at mid-height, never colliding with the door.
Door on accessible side — the +z face, two air cells at y0..y0+1 punched out of the wall.
Chest sits in a back interior corner (-x/-z) to keep the entry path clear.
Lantern centered just below the ceiling for full-room lighting.
lighting_ventilation: One ceiling-hung lantern lights the full interior on Java 1.16.5; four mid-height @glass slits admit daylight from all cardinal directions and keep mob spawning suppressed at the rim.

medieval.notes: Cobblestone keep on a stone-brick footing with plain glass-pane slits — the canonical castle tower.

modern.notes: Clean smooth-quartz tower with stone footing and white-glass slits — observation post / control tower aesthetic.

fantasy.notes: Dark-oak watchtower on mossy cobble with purple-glass arrow slits — wizard-keep flavour.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.square_tower.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
